jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - ASCI - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the ASCI family as a Senior Teacher in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ASCI:
ASCI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI!
